title: Lily's Vanilla OverQuilted
description:
Welcome in a brand new world, Traveler. 
This pack is centered around expanding vanilla and its mechanics.
body:
I recommend regenerating your Nether when switching to Version 1.0. Please report any issues and bugs you might encounter on my [issue tracker](https://github.com/lxly9/lilysvanilla/issues)! ![Visual Description of Lily's Vanilla OverQuilted. A plaintext description can be found below :)](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/102386118/272033726-3b9abeb7-a98d-4042-9e5a-5c89644a183f.png)
Description - Lily's Vanilla OverQuilted -

Lily's Vanilla OverQuilted is a charming and fun Quilt exclusive modpack that adds a touch of magic and adventure to the familiar world of Minecraft.
With a focus on exploration and creativity, this pack features a plethora of new dishes, items, mobs and biomes to discover, along with a veriety of enchantments and tools to help you along the way.

- Features-
🥗 Cooking. Farmer's Delight, Vinery, Candlelight and many more.
🧭 Exploration. Bygone Nether, Towers of the Wild, TLC and more.
🗻 World Generation. Biome Makeover, Wilder Wild, Nature's Spirit and others.
👺 Bosses. Bosses of Mass Destruction and AdventureZ.
🪄 Magic. Enchancement and Enchantery
And much more...

- Requirements -
This pack is Quilt exclusive.
Minimum 4 GB of RAM required.

- Credits -

This pack is assembled via packwiz and doesnt include any mods by itself.
